_comment: Prefer `orca install-hooks`, which merges these automatically. Otherwise add this 'hooks' block to your global ~/.claude/settings.json or a project's .claude/settings.json, and make sure 'orca' is on PATH (make install-bridge). Claude Code passes session_id, cwd and transcript_path on each hook's stdin; orca reads them. Status mapping: UserPromptSubmit/SessionStart = running, Notification/Stop = waiting, SessionEnd = closed.

hooks.command: orca event --source claude-code --status waiting --message 'Waiting for your input'
orca event --source claude-code --status waiting --message 'Response ready, your turn'
